problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: If Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power is applied to universe, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
